hero.sub: I help founders and their families build a legacy through the decisions that shape growth, succession and generational transition.

who.title: Founders and families thinking
who.lead: I work with a small number of founders and families. This work is not for everyone. It requires openness, trust and a willingness to have difficult conversations.
items: Founders who have built something valuable and are starting to think about what comes next
Family-owned businesses preparing for transition between generations
Families who want clarity, alignment and long-term structure

challenges.title: What no one
challenges.lead: Building the business was hard. What comes next is often harder. These are not technical problems — they are human, strategic and generational. And they don't solve themselves.

items.text: You built something valuable, but letting go is unclear
The next generation is not fully ready — or not fully aligned
Decisions are becoming more complex, not simpler
Conversations within the family are avoided or left unresolved
You have success, but not the structure to sustain it long-term
The legacy you imagined is not yet the one you are building

approach.quoteA: I work at the point where
items: I understand both the numbers and the people behind them
I create clarity in situations where there are no simple answers
I help families align before making critical decisions
approach.coda: This is not consulting in the traditional sense. It is long-term thinking applied to real situations, with real consequences. Because the most important decisions are never purely financial.

work.title: Closely involved
work.lead: I work with a small number of clients, staying closely involved in the decisions that matter most. Each situation is unique and requires an approach that reflects its complexity and stage.

services.title: Private advisory
services.desc: One-on-one conversations focused on key decisions, clarity and direction.

services.title: Family business sessions
services.desc: Structured discussions with family members to align perspectives and move forward together.

services.title: Long-term advisory relationships
services.desc: Ongoing support through periods of growth, transition and generational change.

about.name: Danijel Pevec
about.lead: I've experienced both growth and loss — and how decisions made at the wrong time can define the future of a business and a family.
about.p1: I work with founders and their families on the decisions that shape what comes next. Over time, I've seen this from different perspectives — as an advisor, as a founder, and as part of a next-generation family business.
about.p2: I've seen what it takes to build something valuable. And I've also seen how quickly things can become fragile when key decisions are delayed, avoided or misunderstood.
about.pull: The most difficult challenges are rarely technical. They are personal, strategic and often generational.
about.p3: That experience shaped how I approach this work. My role is to help families navigate these moments with clarity, structure and a long-term perspective.
about.p4: But this work goes beyond the business itself. It is about continuity, responsibility and what is carried forward.
about.closing: Because building a business is one thing. Building something that lasts beyond you is something else.

blog.title: Notes on family business,
blog.lead: Long-form essays on the decisions founders and families face — succession, governance, generational transition and the human work behind every transaction.
blog.pageTitle: Blog — notes on family business, succession and legacy
blog.pageLead: Essays on succession planning, generational wealth, family governance and the long-term decisions that shape what comes next.
